coreCompetencies: Infrastructure Automation & Configuration (Linux admin, pfSense segmentation)
Secure Development & Operations (DevSecOps principles, vulnerability assessment, secrets handling)
CI/CD & Pipeline Concepts (alerting/automation workflows, log correlation)
Full-Stack Web Development (Next.js, Tailwind CSS, responsive UI/UX)
Cloud-Adjacent Skills (network defense, container-like isolation concepts, full packet analysis)
Agile Product Ownership (SAFe principles, backlog refinement, sprint planning)
Database & Data Management (SQL, Microsoft Access apps)
Leadership: Cross-functional teams, process optimization, mentoring in high-stakes settings
Monitoring & Reliability: Log analysis, dashboards, incident triage/response
Communication: Clear, concise, effective written/verbal, in high-pressure environments
Teamwork: Collaboration, conflict resolution, positive reinforcement
Problem Solving: Analytical, creative, data-driven, detail-oriented
Time Management: Prioritization, multi-tasking, meeting deadlines
Adaptability: Quick learner, flexible, adjusts to changing priorities
Attention to Detail: High standards, thorough, error-free execution
Multi-tasking: Manage multiple projects, priorities, and stakeholders
Organizational Skills: Structured, methodical, keeps projects on track

technicalProjects.name: Ambrielle's News App (ANA)
technicalProjects.summary: Designed and deployed personalized news platform with AI-driven summarization, automated aggregation, user authentication, nested discussions, follows, and collections. Developed complete frontend/backend infrastructure using Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS; implemented responsive design and performance optimizations. Managed full project lifecycle: conception, development, deployment, maintenance, and scaling.

Managed full project lifecycle: conception, development, deployment, maintenance, and scaling.

technicalProjects.name: Meritorious Advancement Board Application
technicalProjects.summary: Designed and deployed database application for the US Navy Selection Board process. Developed complete frontend/backend infrastructure using Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS; implemented responsive design and performance optimizations.

technicalProjects.name: Security Operations & Automation Lab
technicalProjects.summary: Deployed Security Onion for monitoring, log ingestion, SIEM dashboards, and alerting; integrated Suricata IDS, Zeek, full packet capture. Automated rule tuning, network segmentation (pfSense), and forensics workflows (Wireshark, tcpdump); mapped vulnerabilities to frameworks.

workExperience.title: Assistant Project Officer, Maintenance Management Information Systems
workExperience.company: Commander, Naval Air Forces Atlantic (CNAL), Norfolk, VA
workExperience.summary: Responsible for the development and maintenance of the Maintenance Management Information System (MMIS) for the Naval Air Forces Atlantic (CNAL). Led policy, data analysis, and process improvements for enterprise maintenance systems; resolved discrepancies impacting readiness. Mentored teams and coordinated stakeholders to enhance system reliability and data quality.

workExperience.title: Senior Operations Supervisor / Division Leading Petty Officer
workExperience.company: Pre-Commissioning Unit John F. Kennedy (CVN 79), Newport News, VA
workExperience.summary: Partnered with leadership/shipbuilding to design and outfit aviation facilities for $13B carrier; focused on system integration and operational efficiency. Directed 24 senior personnel; boosted readiness and quality-of-life for 175 members through process enhancements.

workExperience.title: Production Control Supervisor / AIMD Quality Assurance Supervisor / Aircraft Division Leading Chief Petty Officer
workExperience.company: USS Harry S. Truman (CVN 75), Norfolk, VA
workExperience.summary: Managed high-availability maintenance operations for aircraft systems; sustained 95% readiness during overhaul. Automated reporting, documentation, and compliance checks; improved efficiency 20% via software/process optimizations. Led 238-person team across roles; conducted inspections, resolved 2,315 discrepancies; accountable for $5M in assets.

workExperience.title: Powerplants / Maintenance Control / Airframes Branch Chief
workExperience.company: Helicopter Maritime Strike Squadron 40 (HSM-40), Jacksonville, FL
workExperience.summary: Led $100M powerplant/avionics shop; implemented predictive maintenance; boosted reliability 30% via data-driven insights. Oversaw maintenance control and branch operations for MH-60R helicopters; ensured procedural compliance and reliability.

workExperience.title: Aviation Machinist's Mate (AD) - Various Roles
workExperience.summary: Served in various technical and leadership capacities within helicopter maritime strike and anti-submarine warfare squadrons, as well as shipboard operations.
